violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink was set up during inspection. 3-bay sink is to be used to sanitize until dishwasher is serviced and achieving proper concentration of sanitizer. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Ambient temperature of the 2-door lowboy unit was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. No TCS foods observed in this unit at the time of inspection. Service call to be made. No TCS foods to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. The dishwasher does not have sanitizing solution. Chlorine sanitizer is currently being used in the 3-bay sink to sanitize. Dishwasher must be hooked up to, and have the proper concentration of, sanitizer in order to be used to sanitize food equipment/utensils. 3-bay sink is to be used to sanitize at this time. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution. The strips have expired. New test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Facility is lacking sanitizer for the dishwasher. Dishwasher can be used to wash and rinse food equipment, but 3-bay sink must be used to sanitize until dishwasher sanitizer is available and used to the correct concentration. Sanitizer sink was set-up during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigerator. The digital temperature display is not accurate. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
